data.content: Planning complete for Node 20 deprecation fix. Three workflow files need updates: (1) release-runtime-artifact.yml gets checkout v4→v6, upload-artifact v4→v7, and softprops/action-gh-release replaced with `gh release upload` CLI (no node24 version exists for softprops). (2) ci.yml and coverage.yml get checkout v4→v6. oven-sh/setup-bun@v2 already uses node24. Low complexity — version bumps plus one action-to-CLI replacement. No build script or release behavior changes. See plan note for full details.
